diagrams.title: Shallow Copy vs Deep Copy
diagrams.description: Shows two objects after copy operation - shallow copy shares same heap memory while deep copy has separate heap memory
elements: Heap Memory (shared in shallow, separate in deep)
diagrams.purpose: Understand the difference between shallow and deep copy and why deep copy is needed for resource management

diagrams.title: Copy Constructor Call Scenarios
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing when copy constructor is invoked vs assignment operator
diagrams.purpose: Clarify the different scenarios that invoke copy constructor and assignment operator

diagrams.title: Rule of Three/Five Components
diagrams.description: Diagram showing five special member functions in C++
diagrams.purpose: Visualize all special member functions that manage object lifecycle and understand Rule of Three and Five
